description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a pitched gable roof and a light brick or stone exterior. The property is enclosed by a low wall and features a driveway leading to a detached garage, as well as a paved front yard with several small trees and shrubs. The main entrance is accentuated by a small porch, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front facade. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a row of mature trees along one side, providing privacy and shade. The overall layout is compact yet spacious, with clear separation between the living area, garage, and garden spaces. The roof is finished in a muted gray, complementing the neutral tones of the walls and hardscaping.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, light brick exterior, detached garage, and landscaped front and back yards enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, driveway, detached garage, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, row of mature trees, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Left-side view displaying the side elevation, backyard, and the alignment of trees along the property edge.
description_view_3: Direct front view focusing on the main entrance, driveway, garage, and symmetrical window arrangement.
